response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a senior software developer across multiple languages and technologies, including Java, which aligns with the role's requirements. However, his background leans heavily toward full-stack and system-level development rather than core Java or agile digitalization projects in the insurance sector. His lack of explicit experience in insurance IT and limited German proficiency further reduce his fit. His skills are strong but may not directly translate to the targeted responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive experience with Java and object-oriented programming in various roles
Strong background in agile development methodologies (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Proven ability to design and implement complex software architectures across diverse domains
concerns: Limited direct experience in the insurance sector or agile digitalization projects
German language skills are listed as 'Basic', which may hinder client collaboration
More senior-level experience may lead to misalignment with an entry-level role
